---
title: "Academy"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Courses, trainings, and hands-on programs in cybersecurity, open-source, and digital skills"
description: "chen.ist Academy offers courses, intensive trainings, microlearning, hackathons, webinars, and community programs. Learn by building."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:70vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>Academy</h1>
    <p>Hands-on courses, trainings, and programs in cybersecurity, open-source, and digital skills. Learn by building.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="#programs" class="ev-btn" style="background:#F5A623;">Explore programs</a>
      <a href="/booking/" class="ev-btn-ghost">Book a consultation</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">7</div><div class="m-nl">Courses</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">7</div><div class="m-nl">Trainings</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">14</div><div class="m-nl">Microlearning</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">9+</div><div class="m-nl">Years of events</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ALL PROGRAMS GRID -->
<div class="m-s" id="programs" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Everything we offer</h2>
    <p class="sub">Nine ways to build real-world technical skills.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">

      <!-- Courses -->
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/courses.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Courses">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">7 courses &middot; 4–12 weeks</div>
              <h3>Courses</h3>
              <p>Multi-week programs in cybersecurity, privacy, Linux, and open-source development.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>

      <!-- Trainings -->
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/trainings.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Trainings">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">7 workshops &middot; 1–2 days</div>
              <h3>Intensive Trainings</h3>
              <p>Focused hands-on workshops. 80% practical. Walk out with skills you use on Monday.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>

      <!-- Microlearning -->
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Microlearning">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">14 sessions &middot; 1–2 hours</div>
              <h3>Microlearning</h3>
              <p>Bite-sized sessions on CLI, NixOS, Emacs, tmux, Typst, FreeBSD, and more.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>

      <!-- Programs / Hackathons -->
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/programs/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Programs">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Hackathons &middot; Summer School</div>
              <h3>Programs</h3>
              <p>Immersive experiences — hackathons, summer school, and Computer Club.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>

      <!-- Events -->
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Events">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Upcoming &middot; Monthly</div>
              <h3>Events</h3>
              <p>Conferences, meetups, and community gatherings. In person and online.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>

      <!-- Webinars -->
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/webinars.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Webinars">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Live &middot; Recorded</div>
              <h3>Webinars</h3>
              <p>Zero trust, cloud security, digital transformation, and more.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE ROW 1 -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Academy training session"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Real skills.<br>Not certificates.</h2>
        <p>Every course is built around practical exercises, real tools, and scenarios from actual engagements. You leave with skills you can use on Monday morning — not a PDF you'll never open.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/academy/courses.html" class="m-lk">Explore the curriculum</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- COMMUNITY -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Community</h2>
    <p class="sub">Learning doesn't stop when the session ends.</p>
    <div style="max-width:750px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-terminal" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><a href="/academy/computerclub.html">Computer Club</a></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Monthly meetups for coding, hacking, and building together. All levels welcome.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Monthly</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-handshake" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><a href="/academy/partnerships.html">Partnerships</a></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Collaborate with us — bring academy programs to your organization or city.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE ROW 2 -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Hackathon coding"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Build under pressure.<br>Learn faster.</h2>
        <p>Our hackathons and summer school programs immerse you in 24-48 hour challenges. SpaceApps, cybersecurity, AI ethics — real problems, real teams, real deadlines.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/academy/events.html" class="m-lk">See upcoming programs</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Start learning</h2>
    <p>Browse our catalog or book a call to discuss custom training for your team.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/academy/courses.html" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">Browse courses</a>
      <a href="/academy/trainings.html" class="m-bo" style="border-color:#F5A623; color:#F5A623;">Browse trainings</a>
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-bo">Book a consultation</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
